name: Kampala
description: YC W26. Watches one human workflow demo and converts any website, mobile, or desktop app into a stable REST API — no browser automation, no selectors, no LLM calls per action.

skills.name: Workflow Capture
skills.description: Record one human demo of any website workflow to generate a stable, replayable API endpoint

skills.name: Stable API Generation
skills.description: Convert observed UI interactions into a deterministic REST API that survives website UI changes

skills.name: Zero LLM at Runtime
skills.description: Execute captured workflows without LLM inference per step — zero token cost at runtime execution
